title: Assistant Store Manager - GAP India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - GAP India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with GAP India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About GAP India:
GAP India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
